ascendancies.name: Behemoth
ascendancies.flavourText:
Ramping does not
mean to run
away in fear.

ascendancies.name: Antiquarian
ascendancies.flavourText:
History must be preserved 
not just of our ancestors.

ascendancies.name: Wildspeaker
ascendancies.flavourText:
The First Ones exist,
I have seen them in the
forest of the night.

ascendancies.name: Whisperer
ascendancies.flavourText:
it all feels wrong
no I don't belong here

ascendancies.name: Daughter of Oshabi
ascendancies.flavourText:
Once the Wildwood is purified
nature will bloom again.

ascendancies.name: Herald
ascendancies.flavourText:
The end of all things is inevitable.
It is sooner than you think.

ascendancies.name: Aristocrat
ascendancies.flavourText:
Stop thinking that
life is fair.
It is not.

ascendancies.name: Gambler
ascendancies.flavourText:
Life is more enjoyable when
the outcome is unexpected.

ascendancies.name: Paladin
ascendancies.flavourText:
Faith has taught me it
is righteous to protect
others ahead of oneself.

ascendancies.name: Architect of Chaos
ascendancies.flavourText:
The era of Order and its
consequences have been
a disaster for mortals.

ascendancies.name: Puppeteer
ascendancies.flavourText:
Who says life
ends at death?

ascendancies.name: Polytheist
ascendancies.flavourText:
Surely one of them
has the right answers?

ascendancies.name: Servant of Arakaali
ascendancies.flavourText:
The Queen of Spiders
preys upon mortals to
fulfil her dark desires.

ascendancies.name: Blind Prophet
ascendancies.flavourText:
The sightless look to the
darkness for nourishment.

ascendancies.name: Surfcaster
ascendancies.flavourText:
Teach an Exile to fish,
and <redacted>

alternate_ascendancies.name: Warden of the Maji
alternate_ascendancies.flavourText:
A Warden of the Maji has sworn
to walk the righteous path.

alternate_ascendancies.name: Warlock of the Mists
alternate_ascendancies.flavourText:
A Warlock of the Mists
 seeks mastery over
the darkness.

alternate_ascendancies.name: Wildwood Primalist
alternate_ascendancies.flavourText:
A Primalist of the
Wildwood answers
to no one.

alternate_ascendancies.name: Chaos Bloodline
alternate_ascendancies.flavourText:
Your entire existence is merely
a jest to entertain Chaos.

alternate_ascendancies.name: Oshabi Bloodline
alternate_ascendancies.flavourText:
Wraeclast's Lifeforce flows
through your veins.

alternate_ascendancies.name: Nameless Bloodline
alternate_ascendancies.flavourText:
Crawling out of the dark,
you seek the exquisite
light of meaning.

alternate_ascendancies.name: Catarina Bloodline
alternate_ascendancies.flavourText:
Distant screaming echoes...
the Well of Souls, calling
to you from below...

alternate_ascendancies.name: Aul Bloodline
alternate_ascendancies.flavourText:
The Crystal King traded his
people for dark power.
Now, it is yours.

alternate_ascendancies.name: Lycia Bloodline
alternate_ascendancies.flavourText:
The Original Sin
was not your doing,
but it is still your
burden to bear.

alternate_ascendancies.name: Olroth Bloodline
alternate_ascendancies.flavourText:
Yours is a legacy of
heroes... fallen, or
otherwise.

alternate_ascendancies.name: Farrul Bloodline
alternate_ascendancies.flavourText:
You and your pack run wild
and free, brawling
as you see fit.

alternate_ascendancies.name: Delirious Bloodline
alternate_ascendancies.flavourText:
Laughter echoes from
the darkest depths
of your mind.

alternate_ascendancies.name: Breachlord Bloodline
alternate_ascendancies.flavourText:
Deep within you, the chains
of life itself were forged
with intent...

alternate_ascendancies.name: Saresh Bloodline
alternate_ascendancies.flavourText:
Conquer not the darkness within.
Use it. Make it your strength.
